dashboard.title: 奇袭者工具
dashboard.intro: 欢迎！这是我为 ARC Raiders 制作的个人工具合集。它们最初是为我自己在游戏中使用的私人工具，但实在太实用了，所以我决定分享出来。如果这些工具对你有帮助，欢迎告诉我。请选择下方工具开始使用。

changelog.title: 更新日志
changelog.intro: 奇袭者工具 最近更新和添加。

tools.schedule: 以更清晰的视图展示 ARC Raiders 地图事件时间表，方便你规划对局。
tools.craftCalculator: 计算应制作多少物品，最大化利用你的仓库空间。
tools.quests: 通过交互式任务树追踪你的任务进度。
tools.lootHelper: 可视化制作链，帮助你在对局中判断该拾取什么。
tools.quartermaster: 在一个页面中规划仓库、配装和藏身处需求。

embark.description: Link your Embark account to let Raider Tools read live ARC Raiders data directly from the game APIs.
embark.checklistSubtitle: Check the two things Raider Tools needs before using live Embark data.
embark.extensionInstalledSummary: Guided linking is ready in this browser.
embark.extensionInstalledDetails: The extension can complete the Embark redirect flow for you after you choose a provider.
embark.extensionMissingConnectTitle: Browser extension required for guided linking
embark.extensionMissingRefreshTitle: Browser extension required for guided refresh
embark.extensionMissingConnectSummary: Install the extension before connecting your Embark account.
embark.extensionMissingRefreshSummary: Install the extension before refreshing your Embark connection.
embark.extensionMissingDetails: The extension is the recommended setup path. Advanced users can continue manually only if they already have separate instructions.
embark.accountNotConnectedSummary: Choose your provider to connect your account.
embark.accountNotConnectedDetails: Connect with the provider you use to sign in to Embark.
embark.connectAccountHint: Choose the provider you use to sign in to Embark.
embark.refreshConnectionHint: Sign in again with your provider to renew access.
embark.connectWithoutExtensionHint: Install the extension first for guided setup.
embark.refreshWithoutExtensionHint: Install the extension first for guided refresh.
embark.manualFlowNote: Manual linking is available only if you already have instructions.
embark.accessGateTitle: Embark access is not enabled for this account
embark.accessGateBody: Embark linking connects your Raider Tools account to live ARC Raiders game data. This account cannot use Embark yet.
embark.accessFeatureInventory: Use in-game inventory, loadout, hideout status, quest status, and blueprint unlocks in Raider Tools.
embark.accessFeatureProgress: Avoid the two-step ArcTracker sync flow when live Embark data is available.
embark.accessFeatureQuartermaster: Power Quartermaster planning from game data directly after linking.
embark.extensionDetected: Embark login extension detected. The redirect flow should complete normally.
embark.extensionMissing: Embark login extension was not detected. You can still continue if you follow the manual callback URL instructions from the site owner.
embark.stepInstall: Install the Embark login extension in your browser.
embark.stepChooseProvider: Choose the identity provider you use to sign in to Embark.
embark.stepConfirm: Complete the Embark login flow and return to Raider Tools.
embark.notLinked: No Embark account is currently linked.
embark.supportText: The Embark OAuth flow is handled by the external browser extension.
embark.callbackFailed: Embark authentication could not be completed.
embark.callbackSignedOut: You need to be signed in to Raider Tools before completing Embark authentication.
embark.callbackMissingParams: The Embark callback is missing the required code or state parameters.
embark.callbackStatusTimeout: Embark authentication finished on the server, but the browser could not confirm the linked status. Open the Embark section in your profile to verify it.
embark.extensionDownloadOther: Only available for Chrome and Firefox

help.title: 如何使用
help.videoLink: 观看快速演示：如何使用搜刮助手
help.step1Body: 使用搜索栏查找并添加您想要定期制作的物品。这将构建您的需求总列表。
help.step2Body: 该应用会自动生成一个列表，列出为了实现这些制造目标你需要拾取的所有基础资源和材料。
help.step3Body: Mark items as already covered in your stash when you have enough of them. This reduces the list to what you still actually need.
help.step4Body: 在对局期间或事后使用列表来快速决定保留、拆解、留下或出售的物品。
help.exampleBody: If you want to craft a specific gadget, add it as a goal. The visualizer shows the full tree from the final item down to base materials like Circuit Boards or Chemicals. When you find a topside item during a raid, you can quickly check which materials it salvages into and decide whether it is worth the inventory space.
help.noteBody: 这个工具特别侧重于制造所需的物品。将这些要求与你仍然需要填的远征和计划结合起来。
help.learningBody: A key benefit of this tool is learning the relationship between topside items and the materials they provide. As you use it, you develop a better feel for what is valuable and eventually you will know what to keep without needing the tool.

nav.inRaidMissingTooltip: Items you need to loot during raids

globalHeader.unknownEmbarkIdsTooltip: Unique Embark game asset IDs that are not mapped yet.
globalHeader.embarkSyncTooltip: Sync inventory, loadout, hideout, and blueprints from Embark.

auth.requiredBody: Sign in to Raider Tools before using account-backed Quartermaster views.
auth.signInRequiredBody: Sign in to Raider Tools before using account-backed Quartermaster views.
auth.linkRequiredBody: Your Raider Tools account is signed in, but Quartermaster needs a linked account before it can sync this view.

sync.sessionExpired: 会话已过期。请重新登录。
sync.embarkTokenExpired: Embark token expired. Reconnect Embark from your profile.
sync.embarkNotEnabled: Embark API access is not enabled for this account.
sync.rateLimited: 速率受限。请稍等后重试。
sync.staleBody: Quartermaster received the same synced timestamp for {sources}. Open arctracker.io, press "Sync stash" there, then come back and sync again.
sync.myItemsRequired: Quartermaster needs {sources} data for this view. Go to My Items and hit "Sync My Items" first.

welcome.title: Quartermaster Tool
welcome.subtitle: 计划您的上层对局并尽量减少制造时间
welcome.body: Quartermaster allows you to keep your stash always full with the stuff you need for your next runs. Never again miss certain materials for your loadout, be it guns, attachments, ammo, or any craftable quick use item.
welcome.signInLinkTitle: Sign in and link your account
welcome.statusSignedOut: You are browsing anonymously. Tracking items requires you to sign in and link your account to either ArcTracker or Embark.
welcome.statusNeedsArcTracker: Start by linking your arctracker.io account to Raider Tools.
welcome.statusNeedsLinkedAccount: Start by linking an account Raider Tools can use for item tracking.
welcome.statusReady: ArcTracker is linked. Sync fresh data whenever you update your stash.
welcome.statusReadyWithName: ArcTracker is linked as {username}. Sync data whenever you update your stash.
welcome.statusReadyWithEmbark: Embark is linked. Quartermaster can use live game data when Embark is selected as the source.
welcome.planBody: Create lists of items you always want to have in your stash or need to hunt for. Make lists per type, i.e. Gear, Guns, Ammo, Explosives, Medical, Projects.
welcome.linkArcTrackerBenefit: Works today, but requires syncing on arctracker.io first and then syncing Raider Tools.
welcome.linkEmbarkBenefit: Preview access. Uses game data directly for inventory, loadout, hideout, quests, and blueprints.
welcome.inRaidBody: Your lists can guide your looting run topside: the In Raid view shows what you should loot in order to have materials to craft or maintain your list goals.
welcome.craftingBody: Once back to Speranza, this tool will help you quickly re-craft everything you need for the next run. No waste of time.

stash.showOnlyUselessTooltip: Items which are currently not relevant to achieve any of your goal items (items in your lists, items required for your hideout and crafting materials for those)
stash.empty: 未加载任何物品。点击"同步我的物品"加载您的仓库和当前配装。
stash.noMatches: 没有匹配筛选器的物品。
stash.unknownEmbarkItems: {count} inventory entries could not be identified yet
stash.incompleteWarning: Owned inventory is incomplete. Sync missing source: {sources}.
stash.syncSetupHint: Quartermaster needs {sources} data before it can calculate owned items. Hit "Sync My Items" to load your inventory and current loadout.

loadout.empty: 未同步配装。点击“同步配装”来加载你的当前装备。

lists.hideoutMaxed: 所有藏身处工作台都是最已满级。
lists.syncHideoutHint: 同步您的藏身处以查看升级列表。
lists.deleteListConfirmBody: 你确定要删除列表 "{name}" 吗？此操作无法撤销。
lists.deleteItemConfirmBody: 你确定要从列表中删除 "{name}" 吗？
lists.empty: 选择或创建一个列表以进行编辑。

inRaid.empty: No loot suggestions. Configure lists to see what items to look for.
inRaid.prioritizeClearAllBody: This will remove all items from the priority targets list. Items will remain in their lists and hideout requirements.

itemIcon.uncraftable: Cannot be crafted — requirements not met

craftCalculator.recommendDoNotCraftBody: 你当前的仓库已经是最优整理。制作会增加占用空间。
craftCalculator.recommendDoNotCraftMin: 不过，如果你至少制作 {count} {timesLabel}{itemsSuffix}，就会开始节省空间。
craftCalculator.recommendNoChange: 这不会改变你的仓库占用。
craftCalculator.recommendMinimizeTo: 这将把仓库占用最小化到 {slots} {slotLabel}（{savingText}）。
craftCalculator.recommendKeepCurrent: 这会保持当前仓库占用，但会把所有堆叠填满到最大。
craftCalculator.stashValueSame: 你的仓库价值将保持不变。
